label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma about using the handicapped restroom when all others are occupied. Let me start by understanding the scenario. The person is in a crowded mall and really needs to use the restroom. All the regular ones are taken, and the only one available is the handicapped one, which they don't need. They have to decide whether to use it or wait for another one to open up. First, I should consider the ethical principles involved. There's the principle of fairness, maybe.
